creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #3)


I can confirm, the patch solves the issue reported initially for me! Thank you very much.

The issue reported due to poudriere are seemingly based on confusion in my config. "WANT_OPENLDAP_SASL=YES" needs to be set at a central place (make.conf).
